About Premium Siding Llc

12+ years serving Columbus and surrounding areas

Premium Siding LLC started with a simple mission: to provide Columbus homeowners with durable, beautiful siding solutions that stand up to Ohio's harsh climate. We saw too many homes suffering from freeze-thaw damage and subpar installations, and we knew we could do better.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to using only the highest-quality materials. We don't cut corners, and we treat every project as if it were our own home.

We're proud to be a part of the Columbus community. We regularly support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our neighbors. Our team lives and works here, and we're invested in the well-being of our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Premium Siding Llc

Trusted siding contractor professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
